blocks.text: Quest 3 Straps
Please select a strap below for more information, or 'Summary' for an overview.
Quest 3 Straps

The Quest 3 supports modular head straps, and as such, many accessories are available. In the dropdown below, you can see details on several straps, including photos. 

**Important:** Quest 2 straps **are not** compatible with Quest 3 out of the box.

blocks.name: BOBOVR M3 Mini Sports
blocks.value: The BOBOVR M3 mini is a headstrap similar to that of the Meta Elite Strap, but at a cheaper asking price. This is a minimalistic yet comfortable strap.

blocks.name: BOBOVR S3 Pro
blocks.value: The BOBOVR S3 Pro is a pricey headstrap similar to its other battery straps, however it has **2 times** the capacity of the B2, thanks to its 10,000mAh battery, and also includes a built-in Air Conditioning system.

blocks.name: Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap
blocks.value: The Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap is similar to the official Elite Strap but at a cheaper asking price. This version varies from the base comfort strap in that it has a Stealth Knob, and additional cushioning.

blocks.name: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap
Kiwi Battery Headstrap
blocks.value: The Kiwi Battery Headstrap is similar to the comfort headstrap, but it has a built-in battery, extending playtime by 2+ hours on one charge.

blocks.name: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit
blocks.value: This kit allows you to retrofit your old M2 Pro strap into a new one that fits the Quest 3's design, saving you the money of having to purchase a new strap altogether.

blocks.name: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo
blocks.value: Halo-style strap with Single-Point-Charging (Charge Quest and Battery with one cable) with FOV adjustment.

blocks.name: KIWI design K4 Boost Battery
blocks.value: Elite-style strap with Single-Point-Charging (Charge Quest and Battery with one cable).

blocks.text: BOBOVR M3 Mini Sports

The BOBOVR M3 Mini is a comfort strap in the old-fashioned Elite strap-style, it is made to fit nicely around the head without interference around the ears. It is a simplistic yet comfortable strap.

It can be found in multiple regions and is a good choice for a comfort upgrade.
BOBOVR S3 Pro

The BOBOVR S3 Pro is a 'halo' style strap that's quite pricier than its competitors, but offers a lot for the price. It has a 10,000 mAh battery, which is twice the capacity of their B2 Strap's battery, and has a built-in Air Conditioning system, and can still be hotswapped.
Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap
The Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap features an adaptive headrest that cradles the back of your head similar to an Elite Strap.

pages.name: kiwi-design-h4-halo-comfort-head
pages.title: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap

blocks.text: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap
The KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap is designed for zero facial pressure, using an adaptive front headrest design that distributes the weight of the Quest 3/3S.
Kiwi Battery Headstrap

The Kiwi Battery Headstrap is an upgraded version of its base Comfort headstrap, allowing for longer playtimes and Single-Point-Charging (SPC), it has a 6400mAh battery, ensuring your headset will stay charged for a minimum of 2-4 hours (depending on load), and has a memory foam backing.

pages.name: bobovr-m2-m3-pro-retrofit-kit
pages.title: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit

blocks.text: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit

BOBOVR has launched a retrofit kit that allows any owners of the BOBOVR M2 Pro to convert their strap into a retrofitted Quest 3 strap. In the kit you will find additional cushions, mounting plastics, screws and a screwdriver.

On the site you will find more information as well as instructions. 

**Note as of 2023-12-29:** Due to shortages this kit is currently unavailable in many places, including certain regional Amazons. The links below might not work

pages.name: kiwi-design-h4-boost-battery-hal
pages.title: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo

blocks.text: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo

The KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo is a premium halo-style strap featuring Single-Point-Charging, which allows you to charge both your Quest and the battery with a single cable. It also includes FOV adjustment capability to optimize your field of view.

With a 5300mAh battery, this strap provides extended playtime while maintaining comfort with its balanced weight distribution across the halo design.
KIWI design K4 Boost Battery

The KIWI design K4 Boost Battery is an elite-style strap with Single-Point-Charging technology, allowing you to charge both your Quest and the strap's battery with a single cable. This streamlined charging solution eliminates the need for multiple cables or power sources.

Featuring a 5300mAh battery, the K4 Boost provides substantial additional playtime while maintaining a relatively lightweight design at 358g.
